description: Installable, versioned Cursor workflow stacks. Each stack is a complete, tested configuration you copy into your project in one step.

stacks.name: AI Code Review Pipeline
stacks.description: Automated PR review with security scans, test analysis, and GitHub integration. Replaces manual code review with AI agents.

stacks.name: Team Onboarding System
stacks.description: Project memory + standards + onboarding commands. New team members are productive with Cursor on day 1.

stacks.name: Auto Documentation Generator
stacks.description: Generate API docs, README updates, and changelogs from code automatically. Never write docs manually again.
